description: In a smuggling investigation, a flash drive has been seized containing a mix of various vehicle photographs. You must visually review the evidence and isolate all images of aircraft for the criminal complaint. Create a forensic case named 'Aviation_Smuggling_2024' with case number 'INV-AV-001' in Autopsy using the directory /home/ga/evidence/vehicle_photos as the data source. Identify all photographs depicting aircraft and tag them with a custom tag named 'Aircraft_Evidence'. Export a summary report containing a list of the filenames of all tagged items (one filename per line) to /home/ga/Reports/tagged_aircraft.csv.
